column2: Viewing Existing Phased Trial Build-Up Details
column3: ['The CAA program manager logs in to the system. ', 'The CAA program manager navigates to the existing phased trial build-up details page. ', 'The CAA program manager verifies that all relevant information about the phased trial build-up is displayed on the page. ', 'The CAA program manager checks if the overview of the existing phased trial build-up is clear and comprehensive. ']
column4: ['They are successfully authenticated and have access to the system. ', 'They arrive at a page displaying information about the specific phased trial build-up. ', 'All necessary details, such as its name, status, and any associated documents or contextual data, are clearly visible. ', "They confirm that the information presented provides a complete understanding of the phased trial build-up's current state and any relevant details. "]
